title: TENKER Dehumidifier, 2.2L (77 OZ) Water Tank Dehumidifiers for Home, 1000 sq.ft Quiet Dehumidifier with Sleep Mode, Auto Shut Off, 7-Color LED Light for Closet Bedroom Bathroom Basement RV, White
features: Upgraded High Efficienly Dehumidifier: Our dehumidifiers utilize semiconductor condensation technology, equipped with dual fans and dual semiconductor condensers, effectively removing moisture from the air to ensure comfortable living. With a large 77oz capacity water tank, in a closed room at 86°F, 80% RH environment, the dehumidifier can collect up to 35oz moisture per day.

Sleep Mode: The dehumidifier for home has 2 modes of operation. The high speed mode effectively reduces humidity, thus removing moisture quickly and efficiently. It also features a low sleep mode for quiet operation during sleep (< 30 dB). Meet your every need, and the bass sleep mode allows you to sleep and study without any interruptions.

Auto Shut-off Protection: The dehumidifier has an intelligent auto shut-off function to prevent water leakage or overflow when the tank is full. When the tank is full, the red light will flash to remind you to empty the tank. Its auto shut-off feature makes it safe for you to use even when you are away from home.

Colorful Atmosphere Light: This dehumidifier has 7 different colored ambient lights to enhance the bedroom atmosphere. You can choose a static color or enjoy a color-changing cycle. It can also be used as a soft night light to create a cozy and romantic sleeping atmosphere.

Portable and Campact Design: The dehumidifiers comes with an ergonomic recessed handle that makes it easy to place anywhere. This dehumidifier for home is lightweight and portable and can be placed in a variety of spaces such as bedrooms, bathrooms, closets, kitchens, cabinets, RVs and more. Let you enjoy fresher air anytime, anywhere. Dimensions: 7.87"(L) x 5.5"(W) x 13.78"(H).
description: Description： TENKER dehumidifiers keep you away from moisture problems! TENKER dehumidifier uses semiconductor condensation technology, equipped with dual fans and dual semiconductor condensers, its efficiency is much higher than other small and medium-sized dehumidifiers. It can collect up to 35 oz of water in 24 hours in a closed room with a humidity of 86°F and 80% RH. Feature: 2200ML large capacity dehumidifier, removes up to 1000ml of water per day (30℃/86℉, 80%RH), energy efficient, 88W/H. 2 modes can be set: Auto/Sleep. 7 colours LED light, you can choose your favourite colour to create a romantic atmosphere. TENKERE dehumidifier is designed with a touch screen for simplicity and convenience, easy to switch on and use with just one touch. The mini dehumidifier is equipped with an automatic switch-off protection. When the transparent water tank is filled with water, the motorised dehumidifier will automatically switch off and the LED light will turn red; very safe and convenient. The diversity of dehumidifier dehumidification performance, can effectively solve the window glass fogging, air odour, wardrobe moisture and other problems, bring fresh and dry air. Specifications: Name: Dehumidifier Model: QIG-D03 Color: White Voltage: 100-240V Power: 88W Capacity of tank: 2200mL Efficiency: 1000ml/day (at 30℃/86℉, 80% RH). Coverage: 10~30㎡ Dimension: 35*14*20cm Weight: 2.71kg
